deployables.bundle_policy: Keep calm-shell and governance code in one internal deployable with route-level code splitting so internal session and selector grammar stay unified without exposing portal bundles.
deployables.label: Operator Web
deployables.session_posture: Internal authenticated browser surface with receipt-aware mutations, step-up checkpoints, and authority/help handoff returns.
deployables.why_separate: The internal surface shares operator identity posture and can reuse internal shell runtime without shipping customer-safe copy or portal bundles.

deployables.bundle_policy: Portal deployable excludes governance and internal operator modules entirely, and ships only portal-safe selectors, copy, and route families.
deployables.label: Client Portal Web
deployables.session_posture: Customer-safe authenticated browser surface with explicit continuity contracts, plain-language copy, and route-bound upload/approval flows.
deployables.why_separate: Deployable isolation protects customer-safe semantics, bundle size, branding, and blast radius from internal operator/governance changes.

explicit_non_choices: No single mega application that ships every shell family and audience in one browser deployable.
No route-level micro-frontend seams that fracture shell continuity or selector grammar.
selected_topology.summary: One shared TypeScript/React browser platform with two deployables: `operator-web` for calm-shell and governance surfaces, and `client-portal-web` for the customer-safe portal shell.

shared_packages.must_not_hold: framework-specific page composition or branded copy
shared_packages.responsibility: Generated and hand-authored route, shell, projection, selector, and stale-guard contracts shared by both deployables.
Shell ownership, route grammar, deep-link restore, browser handoff return, and same-object continuity helpers.
Light premium browser token system, shell accents, spacing scales, typography stacks, and motion timing constants.

shared_packages.must_not_hold: raw API fetching or cache adapters
shared_packages.responsibility: Operator, portal, and governance interaction-layer bindings mapped from the shell foundation contract.

shared_packages.must_not_hold: visual-only classes or CSS selectors as test contracts
shared_packages.responsibility: Semantic selector helpers and accessibility anchor exports for Playwright-first validation.

shared_packages.must_not_hold: route-local composition or customer-safe copy decisions
shared_packages.responsibility: Typed API clients, command envelope helpers, receipt polling, upload-session clients, and stream adapters.
Shared cache keys, continuity store utilities, stale/rebase posture state, and session-bound storage guards.
Playwright fixtures, semantic locator helpers, contract-driven mocks, and screenshot harness utilities.
